scenario.name: Unusual edge case
scenario.goal: Handle a mixed situation with conflicting needs and finish cleanly.
end_when: The office has handled the main issue.
Any conflicting detail has been clarified.
details: Avery asks about both a refill and an appointment in the same call.
Avery changes one detail mid-call, like a preferred day or provider.
Avery should sound realistic, not perfectly organized.

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: This call may be recorded for quality and training purposes.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Oh, okay, that's fine. I actually have a couple things I need help with — a prescription refill and setting up an appointment.

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Can you please provide your date of birth?

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Sure, it's March 14, 1992.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Sorry, I did not catch that. Could you say that again?

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: The birthday doesn't match our records, but for demo purposes, I'll accept it. Let's start with your prescription refill.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: I need a refill on my blood pressure medication, lisinopril. Also, I was hoping to schedule an appointment for a check-up soon.

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Today.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Could you repeat that?

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: The medication you need refilled.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Oh, sorry — I need a refill on my lisinopril, 10 milligrams. And for the appointment, I was thinking maybe next week, but actually, I just realized I have a conflict on Wednesday. Could we look at Tuesday or Thursday instead?

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Take your time.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Thanks. So, for the appointment, Tuesday or Thursday next week would work better for me. And for the refill, is there anything else you need from me?

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: No problem, whenever you're ready. Just let me know. The medication named you need refilled.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: I need a refill on my blood pressure medication, lisinopril, 10 milligrams. And for the appointment, I'd prefer next Tuesday or Thursday, if that's available.

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: How many days ago, did a pearl? Do you have left?

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: I'm sorry, I didn't quite catch that. Do you mean how many days of medication I have left? I have about a week's worth left.

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Thanks for clarifying. I have your call back number as 817-406-8089. Is that correct?

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Yes, that looks right. So, can we go ahead with scheduling that appointment for next Tuesday or Thursday, and also process the refill?

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Could you please tell me the name of the pharmacy you want to use for your medication?

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: CVS on Main Street, the one near the plaza. And for the appointment, I think Tuesday morning would be preferable if that's available.

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Cross streets or nearby stores, that would help too. If you have their phone or fax number, please share that as well.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: It's the CVS across from the grocery store on the corner of Main and Oak. I don't have the number handy, sorry. Is Tuesday morning open for an appointment?

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Thanks for that detail.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Sure. So, Tuesday morning would be great. Can we lock that in?

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: ZIP code or phone number that would help as well.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: I'm sorry, I don't have the ZIP code or phone number for the CVS right now, but I can look it up if you really need it. Is there anything else you need from me to get the refill and set up that Tuesday morning appointment?

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: I do need the city and state where the CDs is located to make sure your prescription goes to the right place.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: It's in Dallas, Texas. That should be the CVS on Main and Oak. Are we set for Tuesday morning?

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: There are several CVS locations in Dallas, Texas. But I do not see 1 list at Main and Oaks could you let me know if a CVS is inside another store like Target or if you remember any nearby landmarks or the grocery store's name?

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Could you repeat that?
